name: 14-carat Cake with Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Beat eggs and add sugar. Let stand until sugar dissolves, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in oil, grated carrots, drained pineapple, and chopped nuts.
4. Turn the mixture into greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans or a single (13 x 9-inch) pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes for layer cakes and about 55 minutes for the sheet cake, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
6. Cool in the pans for about 10 minutes, then turn onto wire racks to cool completely.
7. To make frosting, combine butter, cream cheese, and vanilla in a large bowl and beat until well blended.
8. Add powdered sugar gradually, beating vigorously. If too thick, thin with milk to spreading consistency.
9. Frost between layers, top, and sides of the layer cake.
10. Frost the top and sides of the sheet cake.
